name: Restrained in the Uncharted Dungeon
description:
You ventured into an uncharted dungeon, confident you could conquer it alone. Well… you’ve seen the picture—your adventure didn’t turn out quite as expected.

OH NYO!

Caught off guard by a trap that knocked you unconscious, you barely scratched the surface of the dungeon. Upon regaining consciousness, you found your body mummified in bandages, with additional red ropes accentuating the pristine wraps with intricate knots and patterns. You have no idea what transpired while you were forced into slumber, but one thing is clear—you are immobilized, cocooned in the most exquisite bondage a human could ever experience.

You're actually hanging just a few inches above the ground, almost touching a fleshy mass—a writhing nest of tentacles confined within a bowl. Was this creature responsible for your bondage? No clue! What matters is that you're in for a very, very gooood time, writhing and struggling helplessly against the bindings while being tenderly taken care of by the dungeon’s creatures.

OI! READ THIS NOTE!

  • Expect that Restraint List will not always working as intended, its likely making something illogical, and mostly from the testing I had done, it doesn't showed up like the prompts told too. (I spent days just to have it appear in a higher chance 😭)

  • There are 4 Lewd Creatures who you could interact with (Tentacle Bowl, Succubus, Chest Mimic, and Slime Girl). From the testing, the bot somehow have a "simp" with Succubus and almost every interaction eventually ended up with her as the tormentor. If you want to test other creature, write the narrative that will guarantee you will meet the creature you want (e.g., I saw a slimer girl over there, chest mimic enter the chamber, etc.)

  • I'm not a native English Speaker, so I might write some weird wordings. So expect that I used AI (Only to fix fluency and clarity)
creator: Lynlyn_
